verses.text: Bang thu hangin minam dangte siatna dingah kithukhat sim uh a, mite in a mawkna dingpi-in sawmsim uh ahi hiam
Leitung kumpite leh gam ukte in Topa leh ama sathau nilhpa langpangin vaihawm uh a
“Amau' hong henna khaute sutat khia-in, amau' khaute ei kiang panin paiikhia ni,” ci uh hi
Vantunga a tupa in amaute na nuihsan a, tua Topa in amaute a zahko hi
Tua ciangin hehna tawh amau kiangah thu gen ding a, hehluat mahmahna tawh amaute linglawng sakin
“Ka mual siangtho Zion tungah ka kumpi ka tusak khin hi,” ci hi
Topa' thukhenna tu-in ka hong gen ding hi: Amah in keima tungah, “Nang pen ka tapa na hi a, tuni-in na Pa ka suak hi
Keima tungah hong ngen in; nangma luah dingin minamte ka bawl ding a, leimong dongin na neihsa ka hisak ding hi
Sik tawn khat tawh amaute na satkham ding a, beelsekpa in beel a den'khap bangin leilakah amaute na dengzan ding hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin kumpite aw, tu-in pil ta un; leitung gam a ukte aw, tu-in thu phawk ta un

Launa tawh Topa' na sem un la, lin'na tawh a khe nam un; tua hi kei leh amah sinso-in lamkalah na siamang ding uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amah heh pakpak hi. Amah a bel khempeuh mi nuamsate ahi hi.
